contract_risk.name: Contract Risk Scoring
contract_risk.description: Score a contract for legal risk flags. Assigns risk tier and review priority based on missing clauses, unusual terms, and liability exposure.
contract_risk.entry_trigger: risk_score >= 0.7 OR flags CONTAINS 'missing_indemnity' OR flags CONTAINS 'uncap_liability'

signal_output_schema.flags: array[string] (list of specific risk flags found)
